HLA-B*07:02.note: PASSES at thresholds 0.10-0.80. Best balance at 0.30. Perfect specificity at 0.97 but loses 4 TPs.

HLA-B*44:03.note: All 5 epitopes found (100% sens). F1 just below 0.85 because only 5 positives in benchmark — 2 FPs drags precision to 71.4%. Need more benchmark positives or eliminate 1 more FP.

HLA-A*03:01.note: Model struggles — best sens only 70.6%. Motif may be incorrectly specified or benchmark curation issues. Needs investigation.

HLA-A*01:01.note: Training variance — this run produced poor model. Previous v2 achieved 88.9% sens.

note: B*07:02 passes with low threshold (0.30). Mixed training successful for this allele. B*44:03 very close. A*03:01 and A*01:01 (this run) fail.
